evals.prompt:
Validate this student resume against Kickass guidelines:

Header: Priya Shah, priya@example.com, github.com/pshah, Austin TX. Single-column, one page, Helvetica 10.5pt.
Education: UT Austin, B.S. Computer Science, expected May 2026. GPA 3.72.
Experience: SWE Intern, Shopify, Summer 2025.
  - Engineered Rails service that reduced checkout p99 latency 42% (180ms → 104ms) across 8M daily orders.
  - Shipped A/B framework adopted by 4 squads; currently running 60+ concurrent experiments.
  - Authored 30 integration tests, lifting module coverage from 58% to 91%.
Projects: Spotify Wrapped clone (Next.js, Postgres). 1,400 users in 2 weeks; 210 GitHub stars.
Skills: Languages: Python, Ruby, TypeScript, Go. Frameworks: Rails, Next.js, React. Tools: Docker, GitHub Actions, Terraform. Databases: Postgres, Redis.
Industry Involvement: HackUT 2024 — 2nd place (240 teams). Mentored 8 freshmen through ACM-W peer program.
evals.expected_output: JSON with situation 'student', one_page 'yes', alignment_to_kickass near 95%+, ats_compliance 'yes', all sections 'pass', top_3_fixes containing only minor polish (or empty).

evals.prompt:
Validate this resume:

Header: Alex Kim, alexk@example.com. Two-column layout using tikz boxes. Three pages.
Education: State U, CS, 2023. GPA 3.1.
Experience: Backend Engineer, Acme Corp, 2023-present.
  - Responsible for backend services.
  - Helped with the deployment pipeline.
  - Worked on various bug fixes.
Projects: Made some side projects.
Skills: Problem Solving, Team Player, Communication, Hard Worker.
evals.expected_output: JSON with situation 'professional', one_page 'no', alignment_to_kickass low (e.g. ~25%), ats_compliance 'no' (tikz two-column), experience status 'rewrite' (weak verbs, no metrics), projects status 'rewrite' (vague), skills status 'rewrite' (generic soft skills only), education status 'flag' (GPA 3.1 below 3.5 threshold). top_3_fixes must include cutting to one page, switching to single-column layout without tikz, and rewriting all experience bullets with action verbs and metrics.

evals.prompt:
Validate this professional resume:

Header: Sam Rivera, sam@example.com, linkedin.com/in/samrivera, Seattle WA. One page, Source Sans Pro 10.5pt, single column.
Experience (listed first — 6-year professional):
  Senior SWE, DataCo, 2022-present.
    - Led migration of 14-service monolith to event-driven architecture; cut p99 API latency 63% and reduced on-call pages 48%.
    - Mentored 3 engineers through promotion; one advanced to senior within 18 months.
    - Drove RFC process adopted company-wide; 42 RFCs shipped in first year.
  SWE, StartupX, 2019-2022.
    - Built real-time analytics platform (Kafka, Flink) handling 1.2M events/sec.
    - Reduced AWS spend 31% via rightsizing and spot-instance migration, saving $840K annually.
Education: U Washington, B.S. CS, 2019.
Projects: Open-source contributor to Prometheus (8 merged PRs, 2 documentation improvements).
Skills: Languages: Go, Rust, Python. Infra: Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS. Data: Kafka, Flink, ClickHouse.
Industry Involvement: Speaker, KubeCon 2024 (audience 600+); organizer, Seattle Go meetup (220 members).
evals.expected_output: JSON with situation 'professional', one_page 'yes', alignment_to_kickass 95%+, Experience listed first (correct for professional), all sections 'pass'. top_3_fixes should be empty or suggest only minor polish.
